name: Backroom Clinic
description: Blue-white lamps flatten everything into anatomy, invoice lines, and consequences.
detail: Instrument trays gleam under a patched surgical feed. Even the silence smells expensive.

fixtures.name: surgical feed
fixtures.inspect: The patched surgical feed flickers between anatomy overlays and unpaid account notices.

mood: A new sharps bin is sitting unsealed under the chair, which means somebody is still on the table behind the curtain.
Tonight Dr. Ilex's task lamp is set bluer than usual; she does that when she is angry and counting.
Saint Mercy-9 has been rolling and unrolling the same length of gauze for ten minutes.
